response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and strong open-source contributions, there is no evidence of C++ or Rust development in commercial geospatial or routing systems, nor experience with routing tile pipelines, navigation data optimization, or distributed systems for map data — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source GIS and geospatial project experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to build high-performance systems using DLang and asynchronous I/O
Strong track record of teaching, mentoring, and contributing to developer tooling and CI/CD
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial or routing contexts
Lack of explicit experience with routing data pipelines, tile generation, or navigation system integration
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with minimal C++ exposure beyond academic/thesis work
